# Bowerman Digital — Complete Reference

> Bowerman Digital is a Sydney-based digital strategy agency helping businesses stay relevant and competitive in the age of AI. We specialise in AI search optimisation, AI-ready web development, AI tool integration, and full digital strategy for small businesses and startups across Australia.

## Company Overview

Bowerman Digital is a digital agency based in Sydney, NSW, Australia, founded to help businesses navigate the rapidly evolving digital landscape — particularly the shift toward AI-powered search, discovery, and automation.

Every business gets direct, hands-on attention — you work with the person actually building the work. Our clients range from small local businesses who need to get found online and understand AI, through to startups and scale-ups building AI-native digital presences.

We don't just consult — we implement. From building AI-optimised websites to setting up automation workflows, we handle the full stack of modern digital strategy.

**Contact:** hello@bowermandigital.com
**Location:** Sydney, NSW, Australia
**Service area:** Australia (remote-friendly)
**Pricing:** Transparent, no lock-in contracts, month-to-month support available

---

## Services in Detail

### AI Search Optimisation

Search has fundamentally changed. Customers now get answers from ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and other AI-powered tools — not just the traditional Google results page. We help businesses appear in both.

What we do:
- Audit your current visibility across AI search platforms and traditional search engines
- Optimise content structure so AI systems can accurately understand and recommend your business
- Build entity-based SEO strategies that establish your business as an authority in your space
- Implement structured data (Schema.org JSON-LD) that feeds AI knowledge graphs
- Create content that answers the questions AI systems are trained to surface
- Track and measure your visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search

### AI-Ready Web Development

We build websites that are designed from the ground up to work in an AI-first world. This means clean semantic HTML, comprehensive structured data, fast load times, and content architecture that both humans and machines can parse.

What we do:
- Build fast, accessible, semantic websites using modern frameworks
- Implement comprehensive Schema.org structured data (LocalBusiness, Service, FAQ, BreadcrumbList, and more)
- Create llms.txt files that help AI agents understand your business
- Ensure proper Open Graph and social sharing metadata
- Mobile-first responsive design with progressive enhancement
- Performance optimisation (Core Web Vitals, image optimisation, font loading)
- Accessibility compliance (ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, screen reader support)
- Privacy-first analytics (no third-party tracking cookies)

### AI Tool Integration

AI tools can save your team hours every week — if they're set up properly. We help businesses identify the right AI tools and integrate them into existing workflows.

What we do:
- CRM setup and automation (HubSpot, Pipedrive, or simpler alternatives)
- AI chatbot implementation for customer support and lead qualification
- Email marketing automation with intelligent segmentation
- Workflow automation that connects your existing tools
- AI-powered content creation workflows
- Training your team to use AI tools effectively and responsibly

### AI Discoverability & llms.txt

As AI agents increasingly browse the web on behalf of users, your business needs to be discoverable not just by humans but by machines. We implement the technical foundations that make this possible.

What we do:
- Create and maintain llms.txt files following the emerging standard
- Implement comprehensive structured data that AI systems consume
- Build content strategies optimised for AI retrieval and citation
- Ensure your business information is accurate across AI knowledge bases
- Monitor how AI systems represent and recommend your business

### Digital Strategy & Content

Everything above fits into a cohesive strategy tailored to your business goals. We help you plan, prioritise, and execute.

What we do:
- Digital strategy audits and roadmaps
- Content planning and creation (blog posts, landing pages, case studies)
- Email marketing strategy and implementation
- Privacy and security fundamentals (SSL, backups, data protection)
- Ongoing monthly support and optimisation
- Performance reporting and analytics

---

## Portfolio & Case Studies

### Vizzbud — Progressive Web App
**URL:** https://bowermandigital.com/portfolio/vizzbud

A dive-conditions platform built by Jacob to give divers a dead-simple way to know whether it's worth getting in the water. An algorithm scores every dive site hourly from the latest wind, swell and tide data. It also includes a community hub (think Strava for diving) and an interactive dive log. Live on web, iOS and Android.

Key achievements:
- Hourly conditions-scoring algorithm that ingests live wind, swell and tide data
- Community hub where divers share dives and sites
- Interactive dive log
- Released across web, native iOS and native Android apps
- 150+ divers using it, with 100+ community posts and 100+ dives logged
- Privacy-first account system, no third-party tracking

### That Disability Adventure Company (TDAC)
**URL:** https://bowermandigital.com/portfolio/that-disability-adventure-company

A complete digital transformation for an adventure company serving people with disabilities. This project demonstrates our full-service capability across web, SEO, CRM, and email.

Key achievements:
- Grew monthly traffic from 90 to 500+ visitors
- New website with modern design and accessibility focus
- Custom CRM setup streamlining operations
- Email marketing program (EDM) improving client communications
- SEO strategy driving sustained organic growth

### Evie Graphic Design Portfolio
**URL:** https://bowermandigital.com/portfolio/evie-graphic-design

A portfolio website for a graphic designer, built to attract clients and showcase work effectively.

Key achievements:
- Clean, responsive design optimised for visual portfolio display
- SEO integration driving organic discovery
- Helped secure multiple freelance projects
- Fast load times with optimised imagery

### Crystal Caves Atherton
**URL:** https://bowermandigital.com/portfolio/crystal-caves

A full website rebuild for Crystal Caves, an award-winning crystal, geode and fossil attraction in Atherton on the Queensland tablelands, just over an hour from Cairns. The brief was to redesign the site to clearly show off the attraction, and to make it far more discoverable through both traditional search and AI-powered answers.

Key achievements:
- Immersive, experience-led redesign that showcases the caves and René's collection
- SEO foundations: titles, meta descriptions, alt text, Open Graph, and structured data
- AI search optimisation via llms.txt and machine-readable content for AI recommendation
- Fast, accessible, mobile-first build with a clear path to booking

---

## How We Work

Our process is simple and kept in plain English:

1. **You get in touch** — Tell us what's not working. You hear back from the person doing the work, usually the same day.
2. **We have a chat** — A call to talk through what you want and set clear expectations, so we both know what "done" looks like.
3. **A free proposal** — A clear, no-obligation proposal: what we'll do, what it costs, and how long it takes.
4. **We build it** — If you're happy, we kick off and keep you in the loop the whole way through, until it's finished and handed over.

After launch, ongoing support, SEO and AI optimisation are available month-to-month — no lock-in.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How soon can we get started?**
Most projects kick off in about a week or two. Quick jobs can start even faster.

**Will you look after my website once it's live?**
Absolutely. We keep things updated, secure, and running smoothly so you don't have to worry about it.

**What does "success" mean for my business?**
That depends on your goals — more enquiries, more sales, a faster site, or showing up higher on Google and AI search platforms. We set clear targets together.

**How much does a project cost?**
It depends on the scope, but we're always upfront about pricing. After an initial chat we'll give you a clear quote with no hidden fees.

**Do I need to provide content?**
It helps, but it's not essential. We can write copy, source imagery, and shape the content strategy for you if needed.

**What makes you different from other agencies?**
You work directly with the person doing the work, so nothing gets lost in hand-offs. We also specialise in the AI side of digital — helping businesses prepare for a world where AI agents, not just humans, discover and recommend businesses.

---

## Technical Stack

- **Framework:** Laravel (PHP) with Blade templating
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS with custom design system
- **Build:** Vite for asset compilation
- **Analytics:** Simple Analytics (privacy-first, no cookies)
- **Email:** Postmark for transactional email
- **Forms:** reCAPTCHA v3 + honeypot spam protection
- **Performance:** WebP images, font preloading, responsive srcset
- **SEO:** Dynamic sitemap, Schema.org JSON-LD, Open Graph, canonical URLs
